title: FCoP REVIEW (Audit abstraction)
description: Abstraction 7 of 7 — Audit. Per ADR-0017 + ADR-0025 + ADR-0026. v1.1 extends the decision enum with `needs_human` and adds optional `human_approval` sub-structure for the human decision record. All v1.0 reviews remain valid (additive only, no removals).

decisionEnum.description: Per ADR-0017 §decision + ADR-0025. 5-value enum as of v1.1. `needs_human` = reviewing agent actively escalates to a human; review status stays pending until human_approval is filled. Never removes a value — only additive extensions.

subjectType.description: Per ADR-0017 §design-details. What kind of artefact this REVIEW is about.

humanApprovalChannel.description: Per ADR-0026. Channel through which the human approver submitted their decision.

humanApprovalDecision.description: Per ADR-0026. The human's final binary decision.

humanApprovalEvidence.description: Per ADR-0026. Audit evidence for anti-phishing assurance. Optional but recommended for mobile/web channels.

ip.description: IP address at time of approval.

humanApproval.description: Per ADR-0026. Human decision record for needs_human reviews. Presence = escalation resolved; absence = still pending.

approver.description: MUST be an agent with layer: admin (per ADR-0023). e.g. ADMIN-01.

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime of the human approval action.

comment.description: Optional free-text comment from the human approver.

review_id.description: Per ADR-0017 §filename-grammar. Equals the filename stem (no `.md`).

subject_ref.description: Reference to the artefact under review.

reviewer_role.description: Per ADR-0017. Role code authoring this review. SHOULD have layer: governance or admin (ADR-0023).

reviewer_agent.description: Optional concrete agent identifier (session_id). Per ADR-0020.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale. SHOULD be present for rejected/needs_changes/needs_human.

required_changes.description: Per ADR-0017. Required when decision = needs_changes.

human_approval.description: Per ADR-0026. Present only when decision = needs_human and a human has acted. Absence + decision=needs_human = pending.

decided_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the reviewer's decision.

then.$comment: Per ADR-0017: needs_changes implies non-empty required_changes.
Per ADR-0025/0026: needs_human review stays pending until human_approval is filled. Runtime MUST NOT advance the task until human_approval.decision is present.
